text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Didja see me blastin' down dat last stretch?! You
just got a taste of White Lightnin's true power!
choice_data_list: Let's try to win our next race, too!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Didja see me blastin' down dat last stretch?! You
just got a taste of White Lightnin's true power!
choice_data_list: Let's try to win our next race, too!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You bet I was! I'm feelin' awesome right now! This
calls for some celebratin'!
choice_data_list:
What would you like to eat? Whatever you
want, it's on me.

What would you like to eat? Whatever you
want, it's on me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Wait, really?! I can choose anythin'?! I'm not gonna hold back, so ya better prep your wallet!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
First, I gotta have some okonomiyaki. Then, it's
takoyaki time. Afterwards, gotta grab some udon
'n grilled offals...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wait a sec... That's what I always get! Hehe, well,
no need to go overboard. Let's just have some
fun!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Of course! And I'm not just talkin' about da next race here, but the one after that, and the one after that, too!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All right! Let's get to trainin' while da adrenaline's
still coursin'!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm not stoppin' till they say I'm da best in Japan!
